offer: For construction contractors managing 5–10 projects simultaneously, missed deadlines cause cash flow gaps. We provide a dedicated project management solution instead of manual spreadsheets and basic project management tools.
problem: Difficulty in tracking project deadlines and budgets effectively.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project management
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on project tools
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Share insights in construction forums and groups
try_it: Let users try deadline tracking and budget monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the solution
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing project data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
